visualizations.title: Inverse Variation Formula
visualizations.description: The algebraic model of inverse proportion where variables have a constant product k.

steps.explanation: y is inversely proportional to x; as x grows, y shrinks.
Multiplying both sides by x shows that the product of the two variables is always constant.

visualizations.title: Painting Fences (Inverse Proportion)
visualizations.description: Watch how adding workers reduces the time needed to paint identical 120-meter fences.
